test_files.description: Tokenizer 单元测试：覆盖正常、边界、异常字符、空串、浮点数、科学计数法等场景
test_files.content:
import unittest
from calc import Tokenizer, TokenType, LexError

class TestTokenizer(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self):
        self.tok = Tokenizer()

    def test_empty(self):
        self.assertEqual(self.tok.tokenize(''), [])

    def test_single_int(self):
        t = self.tok.tokenize('42')
        self.assertEqual(len(t), 1)
        self.assertEqual(t[0].type, TokenType.NUM)
        self.assertEqual(t[0].value, 42.0)

    def test_float(self):
        t = self.tok.tokenize('3.1415')
        self.assertEqual(t[0].value, 3.1415)

    def test_negative_number(self):
        # - 属于 OP，数字本身不带符号
        t = self.tok.tokenize('-5')
        self.assertEqual(t[0].type, TokenType.OP)
        self.assertEqual(t[1].value, 5.0)

    def test_whitespace_skip(self):
        t = self.tok.tokenize('  2   +   3  ')
        self.assertEqual(len(t), 3)

    def test_all_ops(self):
        t = self.tok.tokenize('+ - * /')
        ops = [tok.value for tok in t]
        self.assertEqual(ops, ['+', '-', '*', '/'])

    def test_parens(self):
        t = self.tok.tokenize('(1+2)')
        self.assertEqual([tok.type for tok in t],
                         [TokenType.LPAR, TokenType.NUM, TokenType.OP, TokenType.NUM, TokenType.RPAR])

    def test_invalid_char(self):
        with self.assertRaises(LexError):
            self.tok.tokenize('3 @ 4')

    def test_long_number_precision(self):
        n = '1' + '0' * 15
        t = self.tok.tokenize(n)
        self.assertEqual(t[0].value, float(n))

    def test_scientific_notation_rejected(self):
        # 当前正则不支持科学计数法，应抛错
        with self.assertRaises(LexError):
            self.tok.tokenize('1e3')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()

import unittest
from calc import ErrorReporter, LexError, ParseError, DivideByZeroError, EvalError

class TestErrorReporter(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self):
        self.r = ErrorReporter()

    def test_lex(self):
        code, msg = self.r.report(LexError('bad'))
        self.assertEqual(code, 1)
        self.assertIn('词法错误', msg)

    def test_parse(self):
        code, msg = self.r.report(ParseError('bad'))
        self.assertEqual(code, 2)
        self.assertIn('语法错误', msg)

    def test_div_zero(self):
        code, msg = self.r.report(DivideByZeroError('zero'))
        self.assertEqual(code, 3)
        self.assertEqual(msg, 'zero')

    def test_eval(self):
        code, msg = self.r.report(EvalError('bad'))
        self.assertEqual(code, 4)
        self.assertIn('计算错误', msg)

    def test_unknown(self):
        code, msg = self.r.report(ValueError('what'))
        self.assertEqual(code, 99)
        self.assertIn('未知错误', msg)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()

import unittest
import subprocess
import sys
import os

CALC = [sys.executable, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '../../calc.py')]

class TestCLIMain(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_arg_expr(self):
        out = subprocess.check_output(CALC + ['2+3*4'], text=True)
        self.assertEqual(out.strip(), '14')

    def test_div_zero_rc(self):
        res = subprocess.run(CALC + ['3/0'], capture_output=True, text=True)
        self.assertEqual(res.returncode, 3)
        self.assertIn('除零', res.stderr)

    def test_repl_exit(self):
        proc = subprocess.Popen(CALC, stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
        out, _ = proc.communicate('exit\n', timeout=2)
        self.assertIn('再见', out)

    def test_repl_quit(self):
        proc = subprocess.Popen(CALC, stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
        out, _ = proc.communicate('quit\n', timeout=2)
        self.assertIn('再见', out)

    def test_repl_ctrl_d(self):
        proc = subprocess.Popen(CALC, stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True)
        out, _ = proc.communicate('', timeout=2)  # EOF
        self.assertIn('再见', out)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()

test_files.description: 边界：极大/极小浮点、浮点精度误差、科学计数法拒绝、超长表达式性能
test_files.content:
import unittest
import time
from calc import CLI

class TestEdgeOverflowPrecision(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self):
        self.cli = CLI()

    def test_near_overflow(self):
        # Python float 上限 ~1.8e308
        res = self.cli.evaluate('1e308 * 1')
        self.assertGreater(res, 1e307)

    def test_tiny_number(self):
        res = self.cli.evaluate('1e-308 * 1')
        self.assertGreater(res, 0)

    def test_float_precision(self):
        res = self.cli.evaluate('0.1 + 0.2')
        self.assertAlmostEqual(res, 0.3, places=10)

    def test_long_expr_perf(self):
        expr = ' + '.join(['1'] * 1000)  # 999 个 +
        t0 = time.time()
        res = self.cli.evaluate(expr)
        t1 = time.time()
        self.assertEqual(res, 1000.0)
        self.assertLess(t1 - t0, 0.01)  # 10 ms

    def test_deep_parens(self):
        expr = '(' * 50 + '1+2' + ')' * 50
        res = self.cli.evaluate(expr)
        self.assertEqual(res, 3.0)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    unittest.main()

import argparse
import sys
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List

from models import Task, Priority, Status
from service import TaskService
from repository import JsonTaskRepository
from guard import FileIntegrityGuard


def format_tasks(tasks: List[Task]) -> str:
    """将任务列表格式化为表格字符串"""
    if not tasks:
        return "No tasks found."
    lines = [
        f"{'ID':<36} {'Title':<20} {'Status':<12} {'Priority':<8} {'Created':<19}",
        "-" * 110,
    ]
    for t in tasks:
        lines.append(
            f"{t.id:<36} {t.title:<20} {t.status.value:<12} "
            f"{t.priority.value:<8} {t.created_at.isoformat(sep=' ', timespec='seconds')}"
        )
    return "\n".join(lines)


def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="todo", description="Local CLI task manager")
    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest="command", required=True)

    # add
    p_add = sub.add_parser("add", help="Create a new task")
    p_add.add_argument("title", help="Task title")
    p_add.add_argument("-d", "--desc", default="", help="Description")
    p_add.add_argument(
        "-p",
        "--priority",
        choices=[e.value for e in Priority],
        default=Priority.medium.value,
        help="Priority level",
    )

    # delete
    p_del = sub.add_parser("delete", help="Delete a task")
    p_del.add_argument("id", help="Task UUID")

    # done
    p_done = sub.add_parser("done", help="Mark task as completed")
    p_done.add_argument("id", help="Task UUID")

    # list
    p_list = sub.add_parser("list", help="List tasks")
    p_list.add_argument(
        "-s",
        "--status",
        choices=[e.value for e in Status],
        help="Filter by status",
    )
    p_list.add_argument("-k", "--keyword", help="Keyword filter in title/description")
    p_list.add_argument(
        "--priority",
        choices=[e.value for e in Priority],
        help="Filter by priority",
    )
    return parser


def main(argv=None):
    parser = build_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args(argv)

    db_path = Path("todo.json")
    guard = FileIntegrityGuard(db_path)
    if not guard.verify_or_restore():
        print("ERROR: Database is corrupted and could not be restored.", file=sys.stderr)
        return 1

    repo = JsonTaskRepository(db_path)
    service = TaskService(repo)

    if args.command == "add":
        task = service.create_task(
            title=args.title, description=args.desc, priority=Priority(args.priority)
        )
        print(f"Created task: {task.id}")
    elif args.command == "delete":
        ok = service.remove_task(args.id)
        print("Deleted." if ok else "Task not found.")
    elif args.command == "done":
        ok = service.mark_done(args.id)
        print("Marked as done." if ok else "Task not found.")
    elif args.command == "list":
        tasks = service.query_tasks(
            status=Status(args.status) if args.status else None,
            keyword=args.keyword,
            priority=Priority(args.priority) if args.priority else None,
        )
        print(format_tasks(tasks))
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    sys.exit(main())

import json
import os
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List

from models import Task

_UNIX = os.name != "nt"


class JsonTaskRepository:
    """原子性 JSON 存储，零第三方依赖"""

    def __init__(self, file_path: Path):
        self._file: Path = file_path

    def load(self) -> List[Task]:
        if not self._file.exists():
            return []
        try:
            with self._file.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                data = json.load(f)
            return [Task.from_dict(item) for item in data]
        except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError, TypeError):
            # 由 guard 负责恢复，这里返回空列表
            return []

    def save(self, tasks: List[Task]) -> None:
        tmp: Path | None = None
        try:
            # 使用 PID 避免多进程冲突
            tmp = Path(
                tempfile.mktemp(
                    prefix=f"{self._file.name}.tmp-{os.getpid()}-",
                    dir=self._file.parent,
                )
            )
            with tmp.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                # 独占锁（POSIX）
                if _UNIX:
                    import fcntl

                    fcntl.flock(f.fileno(), fcntl.LOCK_EX)
                json.dump([t.to_dict() for t in tasks], f, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.flush()
                os.fsync(f.fileno())
            # 原子替换
            tmp.replace(self._file)
        except Exception:
            if tmp and tmp.exists():
                tmp.unlink()
            raise
files.description: JSON 持久化层，负责原子性读写
业务用例层，封装规则与校验
文件完整性校验与自动备份恢复

issues.description: 导入 service、repository、guard、models 四个自定义模块，但当前仅提供了 todo.py、models.py、repository.py、service.py、guard.py 五个文件，未提供 __init__.py 或包结构。在 Python 3.9+ 直接运行 python todo.py 时，这些 import 会触发 ModuleNotFoundError，导致程序无法启动。
issues.suggestion: 将所有文件放在同一目录，并在目录内增加 __init__.py 空文件，使该目录成为可导入包；或者把 todo.py 改为直接相对导入（from .models import ...）并在包外通过 python -m package.todo 启动；最简单的是保持全部文件平铺在同一目录，无需包结构，但需确保运行目录正确。

issues.description: save 方法使用 Path.replace 进行原子替换，但未给临时文件设置独占锁或权限掩码。若进程并发启动（如用户双击脚本多次），两个进程同时写入 tmp 文件会导致竞争，最终可能丢失任务或产生损坏。
issues.suggestion: 在写入 tmp 前使用 fcntl 模块对文件加锁（POSIX）或生成带 PID 的临时文件名，并在 replace 前再次校验；或者引入文件锁库（虽违背零依赖要求，但可用 portalocker 的单文件嵌入版）。

issues.description: 每次增删改查都全量 load/save 整个 JSON 文件，任务量稍大（>1000 条）或磁盘 IO 慢时，延迟将显著超过 100 ms 的非功能目标；同时频繁写入会加速 SSD 磨损。
issues.suggestion: 在 TaskService 内增加简单内存缓存（_tasks_cache: List[Task]），启动时一次性 load，后续仅 save 落盘；为保持进程内一致性，可在 __init__ 加载，在 del 或显式 flush 时保存；注意 SIGKILL 场景下可能丢数据，可接受则无需额外 fsync。

issues.description: CLI 未对 title / desc 长度做限制，用户可传入超长字符串（>1 MB）导致内存暴涨、JSON 文件巨大，甚至触发 OOM；同时未过滤控制字符，可能破坏终端显示。
issues.suggestion: 在 create_task 内增加校验：title 长度 ≤ 200，desc ≤ 2000，priority 范围 1-99，并拒绝包含 \x00 等控制字符；非法输入抛 ValueError，由 CLI 捕获后打印友好提示并 exit(1)。

issues.description: argparse 的 id 参数类型未指定，用户输入非 UUID 格式时，Service 层找不到任务会返回 'Task not found.'，但 CLI 层未给出格式示例，易用性差。
issues.suggestion: 在 help 字符串中给出示例 ID；或增加自定义 type=uuid_type 校验，提前报错：'Invalid UUID format, expect 36-char hex.'。

issues.description: 当主文件与备份均损坏时，直接 write_text('[]') 覆盖，但未记录日志或向用户告警，用户可能误以为任务仍在。
issues.suggestion: 在覆盖前向 stderr 打印警告：'todo.json corrupted, initializing empty task list.'；同时可将损坏文件重命名为 todo.json.corrupted 供人工恢复。

issues.description: TaskFilter.match 每次遍历都 lower() 两次，高频查询时重复计算；关键字为空时仍执行 in 判断。
issues.suggestion: 在 TaskFilter.__post_init__ 中对 keyword 做一次 lower() 缓存；若 keyword 为 None 则直接跳过匹配分支。

issues.description: 业务规则（priority > 0、UUID 生成、幂等完成）均内嵌在类中，无独立单元测试文件；一旦重构易引入回归缺陷。
issues.suggestion: 新增 tests/ 目录，使用 unittest 编写零依赖测试：test_create_task、test_mark_done_idempotent、test_query_filter；在 CI 或本地 make test 入口运行，保证覆盖率 >80%。

files.content:
# filename: auth_system.py
"""
用户认证系统示例
功能：
1. 用户注册（密码哈希）
2. 用户登录（发放 JWT Token）
3. Token 验证
4. 使用 SQLite 存储用户信息
5. 完善的错误处理与日志

运行前请安装依赖：
    pip install fastapi[all] passlib[bcrypt] python-jose[cryptography]

启动服务：
    uvicorn auth_system:app --reload

测试：
    1. 注册
       curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/register \
         -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
         -d '{"username":"alice","password":"123456"}'
    2. 登录
       curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/login \
         -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
         -d '{"username":"alice","password":"123456"}'
    3. 访问受保护接口
       curl http://localhost:8000/me \
         -H "Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>"
"""

import sqlite3
import logging
import os
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import Optional

from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Depends, status
from fastapi.security import HTTPBearer, HTTPAuthorizationCredentials
from pydantic import BaseModel, validator
from passlib.context import CryptContext
from jose import jwt, JWTError

# -------------------- 日志配置 --------------------
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s",
    handlers=[logging.StreamHandler()]
)
logger = logging.getLogger("auth")

# -------------------- 配置项 --------------------
DATABASE_FILE = "auth.db"
SECRET_KEY = os.getenv("JWT_SECRET", "dev-secret-key-change-me")
ALGORITHM = "HS256"
ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES = 60

# -------------------- 数据模型 --------------------
class UserRegister(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str

    @validator("username")
    def validate_username(cls, v):
        if not v or len(v) < 3 or len(v) > 32:
            raise ValueError("用户名长度必须在 3~32 字符之间")
        return v

    @validator("password")
    def validate_password(cls, v):
        if not v or len(v) < 6:
            raise ValueError("密码长度至少 6 位")
        return v


class UserLogin(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str


class TokenResponse(BaseModel):
    access_token: str
    token_type: str = "bearer"


# -------------------- 工具函数 --------------------
pwd_context = CryptContext(schemes=["bcrypt"], deprecated="auto")


def hash_password(password: str) -> str:
    return pwd_context.hash(password)


def verify_password(plain: str, hashed: str) -> bool:
    return pwd_context.verify(plain, hashed)


def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta = None) -> str:
    to_encode = data.copy()
    expire = datetime.utcnow() + (expires_delta or timedelta(minutes=ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES))
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    return jwt.encode(to_encode, SECRET_KEY, algorithm=ALGORITHM)


def decode_access_token(token: str) -> Optional[dict]:
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[ALGORITHM])
        return payload
    except JWTError as e:
        logger.warning("JWT decode error: %s", e)
        return None


# -------------------- 数据库初始化 --------------------
def init_db():
    """初始化 SQLite 数据库，创建用户表（如果不存在）"""
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE_FILE)
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute("""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
            password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
            created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
        )
    """)
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    logger.info("Database initialized.")


# -------------------- 数据库操作 --------------------
def get_user_by_username(username: str) -> Optional[dict]:
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE_FILE)
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute("SELECT id, username, password_hash FROM users WHERE username = ?", (username,))
    row = cur.fetchone()
    conn.close()
    return dict(row) if row else None


def create_user(username: str, password_hash: str) -> int:
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE_FILE)
    cur = conn.cursor()
    try:
        cur.execute("INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", (username, password_hash))
        conn.commit()
        logger.info("User %s created with id=%s", username, cur.lastrowid)
        return cur.lastrowid
    except sqlite3.IntegrityError:
        logger.warning("Duplicate username: %s", username)
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="用户名已存在")
    finally:
        conn.close()


# -------------------- FastAPI 依赖项 --------------------
security = HTTPBearer()


def get_current_user(credentials: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials = Depends(security)) -> dict:
    token = credentials.credentials
    payload = decode_access_token(token)
    if not payload or "sub" not in payload:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
            detail="Token 无效或已过期",
            headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
        )
    username = payload["sub"]
    user = get_user_by_username(username)
    if not user:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="用户不存在")
    return user


# -------------------- 路由定义 --------------------
app = FastAPI(title="用户认证系统", version="1.0.0")


@app.on_event("startup")
def on_startup():
    init_db()


@app.get("/", summary="健康检查")
def root():
    return {"message": "Auth service is running."}


@app.post("/register", summary="用户注册", response_model=dict)
def register(body: UserRegister):
    hashed = hash_password(body.password)
    user_id = create_user(body.username, hashed)
    return {"id": user_id, "username": body.username}


@app.post("/login", summary="用户登录", response_model=TokenResponse)
def login(body: UserLogin):
    user = get_user_by_username(body.username)
    if not user or not verify_password(body.password, user["password_hash"]):
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="用户名或密码错误")
    token = create_access_token({"sub": user["username"]})
    return TokenResponse(access_token=token)


@app.get("/me", summary="获取当前用户信息", response_model=dict)
def get_me(current_user: dict = Depends(get_current_user)):
    return {"id": current_user["id"], "username": current_user["username"]}


# -------------------- 异常处理器 --------------------
@app.exception_handler(ValueError)
def value_error_handler(request, exc):
    logger.error("ValueError: %s", exc)
    raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail=str(exc))


# -------------------- 主程序入口 --------------------
if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run("auth_system:app", host="0.0.0.0", port=8000, reload=True)

from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, status

from src.domain.entities.user import User

from src.domain.use_cases.register_user import RegisterUser

    SQLiteUserRepository,

router = APIRouter()


# ---- Schemas ----
class RegisterRequest(BaseModel):
    username: str = Field(min_length=3, max_length=32, pattern=r"^[A-Za-z0-9_]+$")
    password: str = Field(min_length=8, max_length=128)
    email: EmailStr


class RegisterResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    username: str
    email: str
    created_at: datetime


class LoginRequest(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str


class LoginResponse(BaseModel):
    access_token: str
    token_type: str = "Bearer"
    expires_in: int  # seconds


# ---- Dependencies ----
def get_user_repo() -> SQLiteUserRepository:
    return SQLiteUserRepository()


def get_token_service() -> RS256TokenService:
    return RS256TokenService()


# ---- Routes ----
@router.post(
    "/register",
    status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED,
    response_model=RegisterResponse,
)
async def register(
    req: RegisterRequest,
    repo: Annotated[SQLiteUserRepository, Depends(get_user_repo)],
):
    use_case = RegisterUser(repo)
    user = await use_case.execute(req.username, req.password, req.email)
    return RegisterResponse(
        id=user.id,
        username=user.username,
        email=user.email,
        created_at=user.created_at,
    )


@router.post("/login", response_model=LoginResponse)
async def login(
    req: LoginRequest,
    repo: Annotated[SQLiteUserRepository, Depends(get_user_repo)],
    token_service: Annotated[RS256TokenService, Depends(get_token_service)],
):
    use_case = AuthenticateUser(repo, token_service)
    token, expire_seconds = await use_case.execute(req.username, req.password)
    return LoginResponse(
        access_token=token,
        expires_in=expire_seconds,
    )


async def get_current_user(
    token: str,
    repo: Annotated[SQLiteUserRepository, Depends(get_user_repo)],
    token_service: Annotated[RS256TokenService, Depends(get_token_service)],
) -> User:
    """供其它路由依赖的复用函数"""
    use_case = ValidateToken(repo, token_service)
    return await use_case.execute(token)


# ---- Protected Demo ----
@router.get("/me", response_model=RegisterResponse)
async def me(current: Annotated[User, Depends(get_current_user)]):
    return RegisterResponse(
        id=current.id,
        username=current.username,

from src.domain.entities.user import User

argon2 = PasswordHasher(
    time_cost=3,
    memory_cost=65536,  # 64 MB
    hash_len=32,
    type="ID",
)


class RegisterUser:
    def __init__(self, repo: UserRepository):
        self.repo = repo

    async def execute(self, username: str, password: str, email: str) -> User:
        if await self.repo.find_by_username(username):
            raise UserAlreadyExistsError("username")
        if await self.repo.find_by_email(email):
            raise UserAlreadyExistsError("email")

        password_hash = argon2.hash(password)
        user = User(
            username=username,
            email=email,
            password_hash=password_hash,
        )
        return await self.repo.save(user)

from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

from argon2 import PasswordHasher, exceptions as argon_exc

from src.domain.entities.token_payload import TokenPayload
from src.domain.exceptions import InvalidCredentialsError
from src.domain.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository
from src.domain.services.token_service import TokenService

argon2 = PasswordHasher()


class AuthenticateUser:
    def __init__(self, repo: UserRepository, token_service: TokenService):
        self.repo = repo
        self.token_service = token_service

    async def execute(self, username: str, password: str) -> tuple[str, int]:
        user = await self.repo.find_by_username(username)
        if not user:
            raise InvalidCredentialsError()

        try:
            argon2.verify(user.password_hash, password)
        except argon_exc.VerifyMismatchError:
            raise InvalidCredentialsError()

        now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
        exp = now + timedelta(hours=24)
        payload = TokenPayload(
            sub=str(user.id),
            role=user.role,
            exp=exp,
            iat=now,
        )
        token = await self.token_service.generate(payload)
        return token, int((exp - now).total_seconds())

from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlmodel import select

from src.infrastructure.db.sqlite import async_engine
from src.domain.entities.user import User
from src.domain.repositories.user_repository import UserRepository


class SQLiteUserRepository(UserRepository):
    async def save(self, user: User) -> User:
        async with AsyncSession(async_engine) as session:
            session.add(user)
            await session.commit()
            await session.refresh(user)
            return user

    async def find_by_username(self, username: str) -> User | None:
        async with AsyncSession(async_engine) as session:
            stmt = select(User).where(User.username == username)
            res = await session.execute(stmt)
            return res.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def find_by_email(self, email: str) -> User | None:
        async with AsyncSession(async_engine) as session:
            stmt = select(User).where(User.email == email)
            res = await session.execute(stmt)
            return res.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def find_by_id(self, user_id: int) -> User | None:
        async with AsyncSession(async_engine) as session:
            stmt = select(User).where(User.id == user_id)
            res = await session.execute(stmt)
            return res.scalar_one_or_none()

import time
from datetime import timezone
from uuid import uuid4

import jwt
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import rsa

from src.domain.entities.token_payload import TokenPayload
from src.domain.exceptions import TokenExpiredError, InvalidTokenError
from src.domain.services.token_service import TokenService

# 一次性生成密钥文件；生产环境请挂载安全卷
_PRIVATE_PEM = "private.pem"
_PUBLIC_PEM = "public.pem"


def _ensure_keys():
    try:
        with open(_PRIVATE_PEM, "rb") as f:
            private_key = serialization.load_pem_private_key(f.read(), password=None)
        with open(_PUBLIC_PEM, "rb") as f:
            public_key = serialization.load_pem_public_key(f.read())
    except FileNotFoundError:
        private_key = rsa.generate_private_key(public_exponent=65537, key_size=2048)
        public_key = private_key.public_key()
        # 持久化
        with open(_PRIVATE_PEM, "wb") as f:
            f.write(
                private_key.private_bytes(
                    encoding=serialization.Encoding.PEM,
                    format=serialization.PrivateFormat.TraditionalOpenSSL,
                    encryption_algorithm=serialization.NoEncryption(),
                )
            )
        with open(_PUBLIC_PEM, "wb") as f:
            f.write(
                public_key.public_bytes(
                    encoding=serialization.Encoding.PEM,
                    format=serialization.PublicFormat.SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
                )
            )
    return private_key, public_key


class RS256TokenService(TokenService):
    def __init__(self):
        self._priv, self._pub = _ensure_keys()

    async def generate(self, payload: TokenPayload) -> str:
        now = int(time.time())
        to_encode = {
            "sub": payload.sub,
            "role": payload.role,
            "iat": int(payload.iat.timestamp()),
            "exp": int(payload.exp.timestamp()),
            "jti": payload.jti or str(uuid4()),
        }
        return jwt.encode(to_encode, self._priv, algorithm="RS256")

    async def verify(self, token: str) -> TokenPayload:
        try:
            payload = jwt.decode(
                token,
                self._pub,
                algorithms=["RS256"],
                options={"require": ["exp", "sub", "role"]},
            )
        except jwt.ExpiredSignatureError:
            raise TokenExpiredError()
        except jwt.PyJWTError as e:
            raise InvalidTokenError(str(e))
        return TokenPayload(
            sub=payload["sub"],
            role=payload["role"],
            exp=datetime.fromtimestamp(payload["exp"], tz=timezone.utc),
            iat=datetime.fromtimestamp(payload["iat"], tz=timezone.utc),
            jti=payload.get("jti"),
        )

# filename: app.py
"""
图书管理 REST API
功能：CRUD、分页、搜索、输入验证、错误处理、SQLite 数据库
运行：python app.py
"""

import sqlite3
import os
from typing import List, Dict, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, validator
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Query
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
import uvicorn

DB_FILE = "books.db"


# -------------------- 数据库初始化 --------------------
def init_db():
    """首次运行时创建 books 表"""
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB_FILE)
    conn.execute(
        """
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS books (
            id         INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            title      TEXT    NOT NULL,
            author     TEXT    NOT NULL,
            year       INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (year >= 0 AND year <= 2100),
            available  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 CHECK (available IN (0,1))
        );
        """
    )
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()


# -------------------- Pydantic 模型 --------------------
class BookCreate(BaseModel):
    title: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=200)
    author: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=100)
    year: int = Field(..., ge=0, le=2100)
    available: bool = True

    @validator("title", "author")
    def strip_strings(cls, v):
        return v.strip()


class BookUpdate(BaseModel):
    title: Optional[str] = Field(None, min_length=1, max_length=200)
    author: Optional[str] = Field(None, min_length=1, max_length=100)
    year: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=0, le=2100)
    available: Optional[bool] = None

    @validator("title", "author")
    def strip_strings(cls, v):
        return v.strip() if v is not None else None


class Book(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    author: str
    year: int
    available: bool


# -------------------- 数据库操作 --------------------
def get_conn():
    conn = sqlite3.connect(DB_FILE)
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row  # 返回 dict-like
    return conn


def row_to_book(row) -> Book:
    return Book(
        id=row["id"],
        title=row["title"],
        author=row["author"],
        year=row["year"],
        available=bool(row["available"]),
    )


# -------------------- FastAPI 应用 --------------------
@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    init_db()
    yield


app = FastAPI(title="图书管理 REST API", version="1.0.0", lifespan=lifespan)


# -------------------- 全局错误处理 --------------------
@app.exception_handler(ValueError)
async def value_error_handler(request, exc):
    return JSONResponse(status_code=400, content={"detail": str(exc)})


@app.exception_handler(sqlite3.Error)
async def sqlite_error_handler(request, exc):
    return JSONResponse(status_code=500, content={"detail": "数据库内部错误"})


# -------------------- CRUD 路由 --------------------
@app.post("/books", response_model=Book, status_code=201)
def create_book(book: BookCreate):
    conn = get_conn()
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute(
        "INSERT INTO books (title, author, year, available) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
        (book.title, book.author, book.year, int(book.available)),
    )
    conn.commit()
    new_id = cur.lastrowid
    conn.close()
    return Book(
        id=new_id,
        title=book.title,
        author=book.author,
        year=book.year,
        available=book.available,
    )


@app.get("/books", response_model=List[Book])
def list_books(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    size: int = Query(10, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = Query(None, min_length=1),
):
    conn = get_conn()
    where_clause = ""
    params: List = []
    if search:
        where_clause = "WHERE title LIKE ? OR author LIKE ?"
        params.extend([f"%{search}%", f"%{search}%"])

    # 总数
    total = conn.execute(
        f"SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM books {where_clause}", params
    ).fetchone()["cnt"]

    # 分页数据
    offset = (page - 1) * size
    sql = f"SELECT * FROM books {where_clause} LIMIT ? OFFSET ?"
    params.extend([size, offset])
    rows = conn.execute(sql, params).fetchall()
    conn.close()

    return [row_to_book(r) for r in rows]


@app.get("/books/{book_id}", response_model=Book)
def get_book(book_id: int):
    conn = get_conn()
    row = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM books WHERE id = ?", (book_id,)).fetchone()
    conn.close()
    if not row:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="图书不存在")
    return row_to_book(row)


@app.put("/books/{book_id}", response_model=Book)
def update_book(book_id: int, book: BookUpdate):
    conn = get_conn()
    cur = conn.cursor()
    # 先查存在
    row = cur.execute("SELECT * FROM books WHERE id = ?", (book_id,)).fetchone()
    if not row:
        conn.close()
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="图书不存在")

    # 构建动态更新
    fields = []
    values = []
    if book.title is not None:
        fields.append("title = ?")
        values.append(book.title)
    if book.author is not None:
        fields.append("author = ?")
        values.append(book.author)
    if book.year is not None:
        fields.append("year = ?")
        values.append(book.year)
    if book.available is not None:
        fields.append("available = ?")
        values.append(int(book.available))

    if not fields:
        conn.close()
        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="无更新字段")

    values.append(book_id)
    sql = f"UPDATE books SET {', '.join(fields)} WHERE id = ?"
    cur.execute(sql, values)
    conn.commit()

    # 返回更新后
    updated_row = cur.execute("SELECT * FROM books WHERE id = ?", (book_id,)).fetchone()
    conn.close()
    return row_to_book(updated_row)


@app.delete("/books/{book_id}", status_code=204)
def delete_book(book_id: int):
    conn = get_conn()
    cur = conn.cursor()
    row = cur.execute("SELECT 1 FROM books WHERE id = ?", (book_id,)).fetchone()
    if not row:
        conn.close()
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="图书不存在")
    cur.execute("DELETE FROM books WHERE id = ?", (book_id,))
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    return None


# -------------------- 启动 --------------------
if __name__ == "__main__":
    uvicorn.run("app:app", host="0.0.0.0", port=8000, reload=True)

from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request, status
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from sqlalchemy.exc import SQLAlchemyError
from pydantic import ValidationError

from domain.exceptions import DomainException, NotFoundException, ConflictException
from adapters.orm import start_mappers
from adapters.entrypoints.book_controller import router as book_router
from config import settings
import logging

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    # 启动时初始化 ORM Mapper
    start_mappers()
    logger.info("ORM mapper started.")
    yield
    # 关闭时可清理连接池等资源
    logger.info("Application shutdown.")


app = FastAPI(
    title=settings.PROJECT_NAME,
    version=settings.VERSION,
    docs_url="/docs",
    redoc_url="/redoc",
    lifespan=lifespan,
)

# CORS 中间件
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=settings.CORS_ORIGINS,
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)


# 全局异常处理器
@app.exception_handler(DomainException)
async def domain_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: DomainException):
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=exc.status_code,
        content={"code": exc.code, "message": exc.message, "details": exc.details},
    )


@app.exception_handler(ValidationError)
async def pydantic_validation_handler(request: Request, exc: ValidationError):
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY,
        content={
            "code": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
            "message": "请求参数校验失败",
            "details": exc.errors(),
        },
    )


@app.exception_handler(SQLAlchemyError)
async def sqlalchemy_handler(request: Request, exc: SQLAlchemyError):
    logger.exception("数据库错误")
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
        content={
            "code": "DATABASE_ERROR",
            "message": "数据库操作失败",
            "details": str(exc),
        },
    )


@app.exception_handler(Exception)
async def catch_all_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception):
    logger.exception("未捕获的异常")
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
        content={
            "code": "INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR",
            "message": "服务器内部错误",
            "details": str(exc),
        },
    )


# 注册路由
app.include_router(book_router, prefix="/api/v1")

from typing import Optional
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from sqlalchemy import select, and_, or_
from domain.entities import Book
from domain.repositories import BookRepository, SearchFilter
from adapters.orm import start_mappers  # noqa: 仅确保 mapper 已启动


class SqlAlchemyBookRepository(BookRepository):
    def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession):
        self.session = session

    async def create(self, book: Book) -> Book:
        self.session.add(book)
        await self.session.flush()
        await self.session.refresh(book)
        return book

    async def get_by_id(self, book_id: int) -> Optional[Book]:
        result = await self.session.execute(
            select(Book).where(Book.id == book_id)
        )
        return result.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def get_by_isbn(self, isbn: str) -> Optional[Book]:
        result = await self.session.execute(
            select(Book).where(Book.isbn == isbn)
        )
        return result.scalar_one_or_none()

    async def update(self, book: Book) -> Book:
        await self.session.merge(book)
        await self.session.flush()
        await self.session.refresh(book)
        return book

    async def delete(self, book_id: int) -> None:
        book = await self.get_by_id(book_id)
        if book:
            await self.session.delete(book)

    async def list_paginated(
        self, page: int, size: int, search: SearchFilter
    ) -> tuple[list[Book], int]:
        stmt = select(Book)
        conditions = []
        if search.title:
            conditions.append(Book.title.ilike(f"%{search.title}%"))
        if search.author:
            conditions.append(Book.author.ilike(f"%{search.author}%"))
        if search.isbn:
            conditions.append(Book.isbn == search.isbn)
        if conditions:
            stmt = stmt.where(and_(*conditions))

        total = await self.session.execute(
            select(select(Book).where(and_(*conditions)).subquery())
        )
        total_count = total.scalar()
        stmt = stmt.limit(size).offset((page - 1) * size)
        result = await self.session.execute(stmt)
        items = result.scalars().all()
        return list(items), total_count

from typing import Optional
from domain.entities import Book
from domain.repositories import BookRepository, SearchFilter
from domain.exceptions import ConflictException, NotFoundException, ValidationException
from adapters.dtos import CreateBookDTO, UpdateBookDTO, BookDTO, PageDTO


class BookCRUDService:
    def __init__(self, repo: BookRepository):
        self.repo = repo

    async def create_book(self, cmd: CreateBookDTO) -> BookDTO:
        # 校验 ISBN 唯一
        exist = await self.repo.get_by_isbn(cmd.isbn)
        if exist:
            raise ConflictException("ISBN 已存在")
        book = Book(
            title=cmd.title,
            author=cmd.author,
            isbn=cmd.isbn,
            publish_year=cmd.publish_year,
            stock=cmd.stock,
        )
        saved = await self.repo.create(book)
        return BookDTO.from_entity(saved)

    async def update_book(self, book_id: int, cmd: UpdateBookDTO) -> BookDTO:
        book = await self.repo.get_by_id(book_id)
        if not book:
            raise NotFoundException("图书不存在")
        # 如果修改了 ISBN，需检查唯一性
        if cmd.isbn and cmd.isbn != book.isbn:
            exist = await self.repo.get_by_isbn(cmd.isbn)
            if exist:
                raise ConflictException("ISBN 已存在")
        book.title = cmd.title or book.title
        book.author = cmd.author or book.author
        book.isbn = cmd.isbn or book.isbn
        book.publish_year = cmd.publish_year or book.publish_year
        if cmd.stock is not None:
            book.stock = cmd.stock
        updated = await self.repo.update(book)
        return BookDTO.from_entity(updated)

    async def get_book(self, book_id: int) -> BookDTO:
        book = await self.repo.get_by_id(book_id)
        if not book:
            raise NotFoundException("图书不存在")
        return BookDTO.from_entity(book)

    async def delete_book(self, book_id: int) -> None:
        book = await self.repo.get_by_id(book_id)
        if not book:
            raise NotFoundException("图书不存在")
        await self.repo.delete(book_id)

    async def list_books(
        self, page: int, size: int, q_title: Optional[str], q_author: Optional[str], q_isbn: Optional[str]
    ) -> PageDTO[BookDTO]:
        search = SearchFilter(title=q_title, author=q_author, isbn=q_isbn)
        items, total = await self.repo.list_paginated(page, size, search)
        return PageDTO(
            total=total,
            page=page,
            size=size,
            items=[BookDTO.from_entity(b) for b in items],
        )

from typing import Optional, List, Generic, TypeVar
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, field_validator
from domain.entities import Book


T = TypeVar("T")


class CreateBookDTO(BaseModel):
    title: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=255)
    author: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=255)
    isbn: str = Field(..., regex=r"^\d{13}$")
    publish_year: int = Field(..., ge=1900, le=2100)
    stock: int = Field(..., ge=0)

    @field_validator("isbn")
    def isbn_must_be_13_digits(cls, v):
        if len(v) != 13 or not v.isdigit():
            raise ValueError("ISBN 必须为 13 位数字")
        return v


class UpdateBookDTO(BaseModel):
    title: Optional[str] = Field(None, min_length=1, max_length=255)
    author: Optional[str] = Field(None, min_length=1, max_length=255)
    isbn: Optional[str] = Field(None, regex=r"^\d{13}$")
    publish_year: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=1900, le=2100)
    stock: Optional[int] = Field(None, ge=0)


class BookDTO(BaseModel):
    id: int
    title: str
    author: str
    isbn: str
    publish_year: int
    stock: int

    @staticmethod
    def from_entity(book: Book) -> "BookDTO":
        return BookDTO(
            id=book.id,
            title=book.title,
            author=book.author,
            isbn=book.isbn,
            publish_year=book.publish_year,
            stock=book.stock,
        )


class PageDTO(BaseModel, Generic[T]):
    total: int
    page: int
    size: int
    items: List[T]

import asyncio
from logging.config import fileConfig
from sqlalchemy import pool
from sqlalchemy.engine import Connection
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import async_engine_from_config
from alembic import context
from adapters.registry import mapper_registry
from config import settings

config = context.config
fileConfig(config.config_file_name)
target_metadata = mapper_registry.metadata


def run_migrations_offline() -> None:
    url = settings.DATABASE_URL
    context.configure(
        url=url,
        target_metadata=target_metadata,
        literal_binds=True,
        dialect_opts={"paramstyle": "named"},
    )
    with context.begin_transaction():
        context.run_migrations()


def do_run_migrations(connection: Connection) -> None:
    context.configure(connection=connection, target_metadata=target_metadata)
    with context.begin_transaction():
        context.run_migrations()


async def run_async_migrations() -> None:
    configuration = config.get_section(config.config_ini_section)
    configuration["sqlalchemy.url"] = settings.DATABASE_URL
    connectable = async_engine_from_config(
        configuration,
        prefix="sqlalchemy.",
        poolclass=pool.NullPool,
    )
    async with connectable.connect() as connection:
        await connection.run_sync(do_run_migrations)
    await connectable.dispose()


def run_migrations_online() -> None:
    asyncio.run(run_async_migrations())


if context.is_offline_mode():
    run_migrations_offline()
else:
    run_migrations_online()

# filename: news_spider.py
"""
通用新闻标题与链接爬虫
- 支持多页翻页
- 自动重试与错误恢复
- 结果写入 CSV
- 遵守目标站 robots.txt
依赖：pip install requests beautifulsoup4 urllib.robotparser
"""

import csv
import os
import random
import time
from typing import List, Dict, Optional
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse, robotparser

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# -------------------- 配置区 --------------------
BASE_URL = "https://news.ycombinator.com"  # 示例：Hacker News
START_PAGE = "/"
MAX_PAGES = 3
CSV_FILE = "news.csv"
RETRY_TIMES = 3
RETRY_BACKOFF = 2  # 指数退避基数
REQUEST_TIMEOUT = 10
USER_AGENTS = [
    "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)",
    "Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_15_7)",
    "Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64)",
]
# ----------------------------------------------


def polite_delay() -> None:
    """礼貌延迟：1~3 秒随机等待"""
    time.sleep(random.uniform(1, 3))


def can_fetch(url: str, user_agent: str) -> bool:
    """检查 robots.txt 是否允许抓取"""
    try:
        rp = robotparser.RobotFileParser()
        rp.set_url(urljoin(url, "/robots.txt"))
        rp.read()
        return rp.can_fetch(user_agent, url)
    except Exception:
        # 如果 robots.txt 无法读取，保守起见返回 False
        return False


def fetch_page(session: requests.Session, url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    """带重试的页面下载"""
    headers = {"User-Agent": random.choice(USER_AGENTS)}
    for attempt in range(1, RETRY_TIMES + 1):
        try:
            resp = session.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=REQUEST_TIMEOUT)
            resp.raise_for_status()
            return resp.text
        except requests.RequestException as e:
            print(f"[WARN] 第 {attempt} 次抓取失败：{e}")
            if attempt < RETRY_TIMES:
                wait = RETRY_BACKOFF ** attempt
                print(f"[INFO] 等待 {wait}s 后重试...")
                time.sleep(wait)
    return None


def parse_list_page(html: str, base_url: str) -> List[Dict[str, str]]:
    """解析列表页：提取标题+链接"""
    soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "lxml")
    items = []
    for a in soup.select("a.storylink"):  # HN 特定选择器
        title = a.get_text(strip=True)
        href = a["href"]
        # 相对链接转绝对
        href = urljoin(base_url, href)
        items.append({"title": title, "link": href})
    return items


def get_next_page_url(html: str, base_url: str) -> Optional[str]:
    """提取“下一页”链接（HN 示例）"""
    soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "lxml")
    more = soup.select_one("a.morelink")
    if more:
        return urljoin(base_url, more["href"])
    return None


def save_to_csv(rows: List[Dict[str, str]], filename: str) -> None:
    """追加写入 CSV"""
    fieldnames = ["title", "link"]
    exists = os.path.isfile(filename)
    with open(filename, "a", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames)
        if not exists:
            writer.writeheader()
        writer.writerows(rows)


def main():
    session = requests.Session()
    current_url = urljoin(BASE_URL, START_PAGE)
    crawled_pages = 0
    user_agent = USER_AGENTS[0]

    # robots.txt 检查
    if not can_fetch(BASE_URL, user_agent):
        print("[ERROR] robots.txt 禁止抓取，程序终止。")
        return

    while crawled_pages < MAX_PAGES and current_url:
        print(f"[INFO] 正在抓取第 {crawled_pages + 1} 页：{current_url}")
        html = fetch_page(session, current_url)
        if not html:
            print(f"[ERROR] 页面下载失败，跳过：{current_url}")
            break

        articles = parse_list_page(html, BASE_URL)
        if not articles:
            print("[WARN] 未解析到任何文章，可能页面结构变化。")
        else:
            save_to_csv(articles, CSV_FILE)
            print(f"[INFO] 本页抓取 {len(articles)} 条，已保存。")

        polite_delay()

        # 获取下一页
        next_url = get_next_page_url(html, BASE_URL)
        if not next_url:
            print("[INFO] 已到达最后一页。")
            break
        current_url = next_url
        crawled_pages += 1

    print(f"[INFO] 抓取完成，共处理 {crawled_pages} 页，结果保存在 {CSV_FILE}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import asyncio
import logging
import signal
from pathlib import Path

import click

from scheduler import Scheduler
from downloader import Downloader
from parser_plugin import parse_news_list
from csv_sink import CSVSink
from robot_checker import RobotChecker
from logger import init_logger

# 全局优雅退出事件
shutdown_event = asyncio.Event()

def _signal_handler(signum, frame):
    shutdown_event.set()

@click.command()
@click.option("--start-url", required=True, help="新闻列表起始 URL")
@click.option("--max-pages", default=10, help="最大分页深度")
@click.option("--retry", default=3, help="单请求最大重试次数")
@click.option("--output", default="news.csv", help="输出 CSV 文件")
@click.option("--concurrency", default=10, help="并发协程数上限")
@click.option("--delay", default=1.0, help="同域请求间隔（秒）")
def main(start_url, max_pages, retry, output, concurrency, delay):
    """异步新闻爬虫：遵守 robots、支持重试、实时写 CSV、可续爬"""
    init_logger()
    loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
    for sig in (signal.SIGINT, signal.SIGTERM):
        loop.add_signal_handler(sig, _signal_handler)
    try:
        loop.run_until_complete(
            async_main(start_url, max_pages, retry, output, concurrency, delay)
        )
    finally:
        loop.close()

async def async_main(start_url, max_pages, retry, output, concurrency, delay):
    scheduler = Scheduler(max_depth=max_pages)
    downloader = Downloader(retry=retry, delay=delay)
    sink = CSVSink(output)
    robot_checker = RobotChecker()

    # 预加载已抓 URL，避免重复
    await sink.load_existing_urls()

    # 初始任务
    await scheduler.add(start_url, depth=1)

    # 启动 worker
    workers = [
        asyncio.create_task(
            worker(scheduler, downloader, sink, robot_checker)
        )
        for _ in range(concurrency)
    ]

    # 等待调度完成或外部中断
    await shutdown_event.wait()
    await scheduler.join()
    # 发送 sentinel 让 worker 优雅退出
    for _ in workers:
        await scheduler.add(None, depth=-1)

    # 等待所有 worker 结束
    await asyncio.gather(*workers)
    await sink.close()

async def worker(scheduler, downloader, sink, robot_checker):
    """单 worker 协程：取任务 → 下载 → 解析 → 写 CSV"""
    while True:
        item = await scheduler.get()
        if item is None:  # sentinel
            break
        url, depth = item
        try:
            if not robot_checker.can_fetch(url):
                logging.info(f"[robots] skip {url}")
                continue
            status, html = await downloader.fetch(url)
            if status != 200:
                logging.error(f"[http] {status} {url}")
                continue
            titles, links, next_page = parse_news_list(html, url)
            # 写 CSV（按 URL 去重）
            for title, link in zip(titles, links):
                if not sink.has_url(link):
                    await sink.write(title, link)
            # 提交下一页
            if next_page and depth < scheduler.max_depth:
                await scheduler.add(next_page, depth=depth + 1)
            # 提交详情页（深度不变）
            for link in links:
                await scheduler.add(link, depth=depth)
        except Exception as exc:
            logging.exception(f"[worker] {url} -> {exc}")

import asyncio
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse

class Scheduler:
    def __init__(self, max_depth: int):
        self.max_depth = max_depth
        self._queue = asyncio.Queue()
        self._seen = set()

    async def add(self, url: str, depth: int):
        if url is None:  # sentinel
            await self._queue.put(None)
            return
        if depth > self.max_depth:
            return
        if url in self._seen:
            return
        self._seen.add(url)
        await self._queue.put((url, depth))

    async def get(self):
        return await self._queue.get()

    async def join(self):
        await self._queue.join()

    def has_seen(self, url: str) -> bool:
        return url in self._seen

import asyncio
import logging
import time
from typing import Tuple

import aiohttp
from tenacity import retry, stop_after_attempt, wait_exponential

class Downloader:
    def __init__(self, retry: int, delay: float):
        self.retry = retry
        self.delay = delay
        self._last_access = {}  # domain -> timestamp

    async def fetch(self, url: str) -> Tuple[int, str]:
        domain = self._get_domain(url)
        await self._politeness_delay(domain)
        async with aiohttp.ClientSession(
            connector=aiohttp.TCPConnector(ssl=False, limit=100)
        ) as session:
            status, html = await self._fetch_with_retry(session, url)
            self._last_access[domain] = time.time()
            return status, html

    async def _politeness_delay(self, domain: str):
        last = self._last_access.get(domain, 0)
        elapsed = time.time() - last
        if elapsed < self.delay:
            await asyncio.sleep(self.delay - elapsed)

    @retry(
        stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
        wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=1, max=10),
        reraise=True,
    )
    async def _fetch_with_retry(
        self, session: aiohttp.ClientSession, url: str
    ) -> Tuple[int, str]:
        async with session.get(url, timeout=30) as resp:
            html = await resp.text(errors="ignore")
            return resp.status, html

    @staticmethod
    def _get_domain(url: str) -> str:
        from urllib.parse import urlparse
        return urlparse(url).netloc

from typing import List, Tuple, Optional
from urllib.parse import urljoin

from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

def parse_news_list(html: str, base_url: str) -> Tuple[List[str], List[str], Optional[str]]:
    """返回 (titles, absolute_links, next_page_url)"""
    soup = BeautifulSoup(html, "lxml")
    titles, links = [], []

    # 通用策略：a 标签内含标题
    for a in soup.select("a[href]"):
        text = a.get_text(strip=True)
        if not text:
            continue
        href = urljoin(base_url, a["href"])
        titles.append(text)
        links.append(href)

    # 下一页：rel=next 或 »
    next_page = None
    for a in soup.select('a[rel="next"], a:contains("»"), a:contains("下一页")'):
        next_page = urljoin(base_url, a["href"])
        break
    return titles, links, next_page

import asyncio
import csv
import os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List

import aiofiles

class CSVSink:
    def __init__(self, filename: str, batch_size: int = 100, flush_interval: float = 2.0):
        self.filename = Path(filename)
        self._batch: List[tuple] = []
        self._urls = set()
        self._lock = asyncio.Lock()
        self._flush_task = None
        self.batch_size = batch_size
        self.flush_interval = flush_interval

    async def load_existing_urls(self):
        if not self.filename.exists():
            return
        async with aiofiles.open(self.filename, encoding="utf-8") as f:
            async for row in csv.DictReader(f):
                self._urls.add(row["url"])

    async def write(self, title: str, url: str):
        scraped_at = asyncio.get_event_loop().time()
        async with self._lock:
            if url in self._urls:
                return
            self._batch.append((title, url, scraped_at))
            self._urls.add(url)
            if len(self._batch) >= self.batch_size:
                await self._flush()

    async def has_url(self, url: str) -> bool:
        async with self._lock:
            return url in self._urls

    async def _flush(self):
        if not self._batch:
            return
        # 追加写
        new_file = not self.filename.exists()
        async with aiofiles.open(self.filename, "a", encoding="utf-8", newline="") as f:
            writer = csv.writer(f)
            if new_file:
                await f.write("title,url,scraped_at\n")
            for row in self._batch:
                await f.write(",".join([f'"{r}"' for r in row]) + "\n")
        self._batch.clear()

    async def _periodic_flush(self):
        while True:
            await asyncio.sleep(self.flush_interval)
            async with self._lock:
                await self._flush()

    async def close(self):
        if self._flush_task:
            self._flush_task.cancel()
            try:
                await self._flush_task
            except asyncio.CancelledError:
                pass
        async with self._lock:
            await self._flush()

    async def __aenter__(self):
        self._flush_task = asyncio.create_task(self._periodic_flush())
        return self

    async def __aexit__(self, exc_type, exc, tb):
        await self.close()

issues.description: 缺少第三方依赖 aiofiles，代码无法直接运行
issues.suggestion: 在 requirements.txt 中显式列出 aiofiles>=0.8

issues.description: worker 任务在 scheduler.join() 完成后才被 cancel，可能丢失队列尾部任务
issues.suggestion: 使用 asyncio.Event 或 sentinel 机制，让 worker 优雅退出；或在 join 前发送 None sentinel

issues.description: 每次写 CSV 都打开/关闭文件，且逐行 flush，高并发下磁盘 I/O 成为瓶颈
issues.suggestion: 维护一个异步写队列 + 批量 flush，或每 N 条/每 T 秒 flush 一次

issues.description: resp.text 未限制大小，可能因恶意大页面导致内存暴涨
issues.suggestion: 使用 aiohttp 的 content-length 或流式读取，设置最大 2~5 MB 阈值

issues.description: RobotChecker 内部又实例化一个 Downloader，导致重复连接池、politeness 参数不一致
issues.suggestion: 通过依赖注入把公用的 Downloader 传进来，或单独建一个轻量 robots 下载器

issues.description: has_seen 不加锁，可能并发读取脏数据
issues.suggestion: 把 seen 查询也放进同一个 async lock 作用域

issues.description: 使用 CSS4 伪类选择器 :contains，lxml 不支持，可能返回空列表
issues.suggestion: 改用 soup.find_all(text=re.compile('下一页|Next')) 再回溯父节点

issues.description: 未对 title/url 中的双引号进行转义，可能破坏 CSV 格式甚至引发注入
issues.suggestion: 使用标准库 csv.writer 的默认转义，或 aiofiles 打开后把 writerow 序列化

issues.description: domain 提取方式简单 split，无法处理带端口或非标准 URL
issues.suggestion: 使用 urlparse(url).netloc 作为 key

issues.description: setup_logger 使用全局 basicConfig，重复调用会失效
issues.suggestion: 保证只在主模块调用一次，或在函数内判断 logging.root.handlers

issues.description: 无单元测试、无集成测试，无法回归验证
